architectureDecision.label: Manifest + CI test
architectureDecision.rationale: Committed check-stage-groups manifest; test asserts every run-check-stages stage appears exactly once; ambiguous stages default to full/release.

readyReview.decision: Stage-to-group mapping in versioned manifest with coverage test; ambiguous stages use full/release group.

technicalBreakdown: Add scripts/check-stage-groups.json (or equivalent) mapping each stage to code/docs/governance/extension/full.
Add test ensuring every stage in run-check-stages.mjs appears exactly once in manifest.
Expose pnpm run check:code, check:docs, check:governance, check:extension; keep check as full union.
Document ambiguous-stage default to full/release in manifest header comment.

acceptanceCriteria: pnpm run check retains full all-stage behavior for local validation.
Focused check:* scripts exist; manifest assigns every stage to at least one group.
CI test fails if a stage is missing from manifest or appears in multiple groups.
Local command proves each new group runs independently.
